note: TODDLER stage. Time-boxed registration window for toddler programs — activity_signup_open. Hand-derived from taxonomy: an OPENING registration window for a program is activity_signup_open, distinct from daycare_communication (which is comms from an already-enrolled provider).

input.rawContent:
From: register@cityrec.ca
Subject: Toddler Fall session — registration opens Thursday 9 AM

Registration for Fall toddler programs (Tumble Tots, Toddler Swim, Music & Movement, ages 2-3) opens this Thursday at 9:00 AM. Spots are limited and popular sessions fill within minutes. Log in early.
